finding: Day-1-close IPO chasing is a negative base-rate trade.
key_number: 365d median excess vs SPY -28.4%; only 19% beat SPY.
spacex_decision_rule: Start from skepticism; do not buy SpaceX just because the IPO is famous.

finding: Small/noisy IPOs are removed; only institutional-scale comps remain.
key_number: Filtered 6m comp median from first close -14.7%.
spacex_decision_rule: Quality filter reduces junk risk but still leaves post-IPO fade risk.

finding: SpaceX has unusually tight immediate tradable supply plus a Nasdaq-100 fast-entry path.
key_number: Immediate float 4.25%; Nasdaq low-float modified market cap about $225B.
spacex_decision_rule: Treat early upside as flow/scarcity, not proof of long-term entry quality.

finding: First-six-month releases, Musk control and registration-rights overhang cap public-entry quality.
key_number: Q2/Q3 earnings unlocks plus 70/90/105/120/135/180-day releases are multiples of IPO float.
spacex_decision_rule: Wait for unlock absorption before underwriting a larger long-term position.
